actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Fast, stealthy climber with high mobility
tactical_info.positioning: Uses high speed and climbing to get advantageous positions
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing per hit, focused on speed over damage
tactical_info.key_abilities: High DEX and acrobatics make it hard to pin down
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP, poor durability in sustained combat
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for reconnaissance and hit-and-run tactics
